description_long: This cabin features a modern, boxy design with a flat, overhanging roof and a mix of materials including light wood, white paneling, and black geometric accents. The front facade displays a prominent rectangular door and three horizontally aligned windows, framed in wood and set against a black wall. The upper section of the cabin is clad in white vertical planks, with a slatted wooden overhang providing visual interest and partial shading. One side of the cabin has a unique lattice detail, while the rear is more austere with plain white paneling and a solid black base. The roof is flat and constructed from light wood, with a visible support pole extending upward, suggesting a possible utility or decorative feature.
description: A modern, boxy cabin with a flat wooden roof, black and white geometric walls, and a front facade featuring a door and three windows.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side lattice detail, the overhanging slatted roof, and the geometric black-and-white lower wall.
description_view_1: The rear view shows a plain white upper section and a solid black lower wall, with minimal architectural features.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the flat wooden roof, the striped overhang, and the geometric wall pattern.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main entrance door and three horizontally aligned windows set in a black wall, with the slatted overhang above.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with a slight overhang, constructed from light wood planks
attribute_window_arrangement: Three medium-sized rectangular windows are horizontally aligned on the front facade, framed in wood and set in a black wall, forming a symmetrical grouping
attribute_door_placement: A single rectangular door is located on the left side of the front facade, adjacent to the row of windows
